name: Austin
tagline: Live Music, No State Income Tax, and Year-Round Sunshine
description: Austin combines a vibrant cultural scene with zero state income tax, making it a compelling domestic FIRE destination. The city offers world-class dining, outdoor recreation along the Colorado River, and a booming tech economy if you ever want to un-retire. While housing costs have risen sharply, Austin still undercuts coastal cities and rewards careful budgeting with an exceptional quality of life.

quickFacts.visa: No visa required for US citizens
quickFacts.climate: Subtropical with hot summers and mild winters

housing.description: 1BR apartment in a central neighborhood like East Riverside or North Loop

dining.description: Taco trucks and casual eateries 2-3x/week; mostly cooking at home

healthcare.description: ACA marketplace Silver plan; Texas has no state exchange so costs run higher

transportation.description: Older paid-off car with insurance, gas, and basic maintenance

entertainment.description: Free live music on 6th Street, Barton Springs, parks; occasional concert ticket

1M.lifestyle: This is a tight budget in Austin. You can survive but you will feel the squeeze, especially in summer when electric bills spike from A/C. Expect to cook most meals, take advantage of Austin's abundant free entertainment, and drive a modest car. You will live comfortably enough but without much margin for surprises.

housing.description: Nice 2BR apartment in South Lamar, Mueller, or a condo in East Austin

dining.description: Dining out 3-4x/week at mid-range restaurants; weekend brunch culture

healthcare.description: ACA Gold plan with lower deductibles; dental and vision add-ons

transportation.description: Reliable mid-range car, full coverage insurance, gas and upkeep

entertainment.description: ACL and SXSW tickets, paddle boarding on Lady Bird Lake, gym membership

2M.lifestyle: A comfortable Austin life opens up at this level. You can enjoy the city's famous food scene regularly, catch live music several nights a week, and keep a solid car for exploring the Hill Country on weekends. Healthcare is covered without constant worry, and you still have breathing room for travel or hobbies.

housing.description: 3BR house in Travis Heights, Zilker, or a modern condo downtown

dining.description: Regular dining at top Austin restaurants like Uchi, Emmer & Rye; daily coffee shop visits

healthcare.description: Premium ACA plan or private health insurance with comprehensive coverage

transportation.description: Late-model SUV or sedan, premium insurance, occasional rideshare

entertainment.description: Season tickets, boat rental on Lake Travis, premium gym, regular live events

3M.lifestyle: Life is genuinely great at this tier. You can rent a house in one of Austin's most desirable neighborhoods, dine at the best restaurants without flinching, and fully immerse yourself in the music and outdoor culture. Weekend trips to Fredericksburg wine country or Big Bend are easy additions to your routine.

housing.description: Upscale 4BR home in Westlake, Tarrytown, or a luxury downtown high-rise

dining.description: Fine dining multiple times per week, private chef for occasional dinner parties

healthcare.description: Concierge medicine or top-tier private insurance with no-deductible plans

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle (Tesla, BMW), premium insurance, detailing service

entertainment.description: VIP festival passes, country club membership, lake house weekends, premium experiences

domesticHelp.description: Bi-weekly house cleaning, landscaping service, occasional personal assistant tasks

luxuryExtras.description: Quarterly domestic travel, premium wine subscriptions, spa days, philanthropy

5M.lifestyle: You are living Austin's best life. A beautiful home in the hills or a sleek downtown penthouse, dinners at the city's top-tier restaurants, VIP access at ACL and F1. You can be generous with friends and family and still invest surplus back into your portfolio.

housing.description: Estate home in Barton Creek or Lake Austin waterfront property

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive dining experiences, catered events at home

healthcare.description: Top-tier concierge medical practice, executive health screenings, holistic wellness

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, dedicated driver for events, private car service

entertainment.description: Private box at UT games, philanthropic galas, art collecting, international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, personal assistant, pool and grounds maintenance crew

luxuryExtras.description: First-class international travel, ranch property, boat on Lake Travis, angel investing

10M.lifestyle: At this level Austin becomes your personal playground. A sprawling estate on Lake Austin, a personal chef, courtside seats, and enough left over to fund startups or causes you care about. Texas's zero income tax means every dollar of your withdrawals stays with you.
